data.title: Perpetual Sets Final DRP Price for December-Half Dividend
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Perpetual Limited ( (AU:PPT) ) has issued an update.

Perpetual Limited has updated its notification regarding the upcoming dividend on its ordinary fully paid shares, confirming it relates to the six-month period ending 31 December 2025. The company specified that the update reflects the final price for its Dividend Reinvestment Plan, calculated based on the 10-day volume-weighted average price, following the earlier record and ex-dividend dates in March 2026.

This clarification on the DRP pricing provides shareholders with certainty on the share allocation they will receive in lieu of cash, which may support participation in the plan and underpin the company’s capital management strategy. The announcement does not alter the previously disclosed key timetable for the dividend but refines the financial terms for investors choosing to reinvest their distributions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PPT) stock is a Hold with a A$16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Perpetual Limited stock, see the AU:PPT Stock Forecast page.

More about Perpetual Limited

Perpetual Limited is an Australian-listed financial services company trading under the ASX code PPT. It issues ordinary fully paid securities and operates within the investment and wealth management sector, providing services to institutional and retail investors in the Australian market.

data.title: Jiangsu Expressway Names Ge Yang as Lead Independent Director to Bolster Governance
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Jiangsu Expressway Co ( (HK:0177) ).

Jiangsu Expressway has appointed existing independent non-executive director Ge Yang as its lead independent non-executive director, effective 27 March 2026, while he continues to serve on the remuneration and assessment committee and the nomination committee. His role focuses on strengthening communication among independent directors, the broader board, and shareholders, particularly minority investors, without assuming any executive or managerial functions.

The new position is being introduced in response to the revised Corporate Governance Code under Hong Kong listing rules that came into force in July 2025, reflecting the company’s efforts to align with evolving governance standards. The board expects that establishing a lead independent director will improve board effectiveness and diversity, reinforcing Jiangsu Expressway’s commitment to robust corporate governance and potentially enhancing confidence among investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0177) stock is a Hold with a HK$11.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jiangsu Expressway Co stock, see the HK:0177 Stock Forecast page.

More about Jiangsu Expressway Co

Jiangsu Expressway Company Limited is a PRC-based joint-stock company that operates in the transportation infrastructure sector, primarily focused on investment, construction, and operation of expressways and related toll-road assets. Listed in Hong Kong, the company serves road users and regional economic activity in Jiangsu province and surrounding areas, making corporate governance and regulatory compliance central to its market positioning.

YTD Price Performance: -2.60%

Average Trading Volume: 5,699,333

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: CONNEQT’s Pulse Monitor Earns AARP Nod as One of 2026’s Best Devices
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CardieX ( (AU:CQT) ) has issued an update.

CONNEQT Health’s CONNEQT Pulse arterial health monitor has been named one of the “Best Blood Pressure Monitors of 2026” by AARP and singled out for providing the “Most Comprehensive Data” among devices evaluated. AARP’s endorsement, given its status as a highly trusted organisation for Americans over 50, underscores Pulse’s differentiated cardiovascular insights, including central blood pressure and arterial health metrics, and is expected to bolster CONNEQT’s positioning as a category leader in advanced arterial health monitoring while supporting its expanding U.S. commercial operations.

The recognition aligns with CONNEQT’s strategy to bring clinically meaningful cardiovascular analytics into the home and strengthens its appeal among populations at higher risk of hypertension and cardiovascular disease. Management believes the accolade will increase consumer awareness and validate the company’s technology-driven approach as it scales its presence in the large and growing U.S. market for remote and home-based cardiovascular monitoring solutions.

More about CardieX

CONNEQT Health Limited is a medical technology company focused on vascular health, offering medical and home health devices and digital solutions for hypertension, cardiovascular disease and related disorders. Its products are built on the company’s proprietary SphygmoCor vascular biomarker technology and are aimed at both clinical and consumer markets, with the company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the ticker CQT.

data.title: Alterity Wins FDA Backing on Key Elements of ATH434 Phase 3 Plan
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Alterity Therapeutics ( (AU:ATH) ) has issued an announcement.

Alterity Therapeutics has received positive written feedback from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration following a Type C Meeting on its planned Phase 3 development program for ATH434 in Multiple System Atrophy. The regulator supported the company’s plans for clinical pharmacology and non-clinical development components, marking a key regulatory milestone toward initiating a pivotal Phase 3 trial.

The company now plans to seek further agreement with the FDA on Chemistry, Manufacturing, and Controls, as well as the Phase 3 trial design, with an End-of-Phase 2 meeting targeted for mid-2026. The favorable interaction strengthens Alterity’s regulatory pathway for ATH434 and underscores its progress in advancing a potential disease-modifying treatment for a rare, rapidly progressive neurodegenerative condition.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ATH) stock is a Hold with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alterity Therapeutics stock, see the AU:ATH Stock Forecast page.

More about Alterity Therapeutics

Alterity Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing disease-modifying therapies for neurodegenerative diseases, with a primary focus on Multiple System Atrophy (MSA) and related Parkinsonian disorders. Its lead candidate, ATH434, has shown clinically meaningful efficacy in a Phase 2 placebo-controlled trial and additional positive data in an open-label study in advanced MSA, supported by a broader discovery platform for novel neurological treatments.

data.title: Jiangsu Expressway to Lend Up to RMB4.3 Billion to Subsidiaries in Connected Deals
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Jiangsu Expressway Co ( (HK:0177) ) has provided an update.

Jiangsu Expressway has approved a plan to extend up to RMB4.3 billion in loans, funded with its own capital, to four subsidiaries—Wufengshan Toll Bridge, Guangjing Xicheng, Yichang and Changyi—for refinancing project loans, replenishing working capital, repaying maturing borrowings and other compliant purposes over three-year terms. Interest will be based on the company’s prevailing direct financing rates, with each subsidiary bearing related issuance and repayment costs, and the actual drawdown capped by both the approved quotas and future financing conditions.

Because key shareholders hold significant stakes in these subsidiaries, the loans are classified as connected transactions under Hong Kong Listing Rules, triggering requirements for announcement, a circular and independent shareholders’ approval where applicable. The move centralizes funding within the group, potentially lowering financing costs and improving liquidity management for the expressway portfolio, while also subjecting the company to heightened governance scrutiny and compliance obligations around related-party dealings.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0177) stock is a Hold with a HK$11.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jiangsu Expressway Co stock, see the HK:0177 Stock Forecast page.

More about Jiangsu Expressway Co

Jiangsu Expressway Company Limited is a PRC-based joint-stock company primarily engaged in the investment, construction, operation, and management of expressways and related infrastructure in Jiangsu Province. Listed in Hong Kong, it operates toll roads and bridges, focusing on regional transportation corridors that support economic activity and long-distance travel in eastern China.

Average Trading Volume: 5,699,333

data.title: Aldoro boosts Kameelburg REE outlook with higher-grade 525m drill hit
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aldoro Resources Ltd. ( (AU:ARN) ) has provided an announcement.

Aldoro Resources has reported strong assay results from the Phase II drilling program at its Kameelburg carbonatite project, with diamond hole DD005F intersecting 525 meters of continuous mineralisation containing rare earth elements, strontium, niobium and molybdenum. The hole ended in mineralisation, suggesting the system remains open at depth and confirming the presence of extensive mineralised zones.

DD005F returned an average grade of 1.20% TREO and 3.55% SrCO3 across the entire 525 meters, representing about a 50% improvement in REE and strontium grades over the previously reported step-out hole DD005E. A series of shallow, higher-grade intercepts from surface and near-surface enhances the potential for early mining optionality and may strengthen Aldoro’s positioning in the critical minerals space, pending further drilling and project studies.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ARN) stock is a Sell with a A$0.33 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aldoro Resources Ltd. stock, see the AU:ARN Stock Forecast page.

More about Aldoro Resources Ltd.

Aldoro Resources Ltd is an ASX-listed exploration company focused on rare earth elements, niobium, strontium and associated critical minerals. The company is advancing its Kameelburg carbonatite project, targeting large-scale deposits of REE and niobium that could support demand from high-tech, energy transition and industrial markets.

Average Trading Volume: 193,047

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$95.67M

data.title: Lincoln Minerals cleared to start copper drilling at Minbrie in Q2 2026
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Lincoln Minerals Limited ( (AU:LML) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Lincoln Minerals has secured all government and landowner approvals to begin Stage 1 drilling at its Minbrie Copper Project on South Australia’s Eyre Peninsula, with an air core rig booked to start at least 40 holes in the second quarter of 2026. The program will focus on roughly 1.7km of previously untested strike at the Eagle Ridge prospect, part of a larger 17km copper- and base metal‑prospective stratigraphy, where historic drilling returned strong polymetallic intercepts that were never properly followed up.

The initial wide-spaced air core campaign is designed to map and rank zones of copper and base metal mineralisation across Minbrie, guiding potential reverse circulation and diamond drilling later in 2026 at the most promising targets. By systematically testing underexplored ground that historic work overlooked or only partially logged, Lincoln is aiming to unlock additional mineralised zones, strengthen its copper exploration credentials on the Eyre Peninsula, and potentially enhance the project’s strategic value for investors and regional stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:LML) stock is a Sell with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lincoln Minerals Limited stock, see the AU:LML Stock Forecast page.

More about Lincoln Minerals Limited

Lincoln Minerals Limited is an ASX-listed explorer focused on copper and base metals on South Australia’s Eyre Peninsula. The company controls the Minbrie Project, which includes 17km of target stratigraphy that has historically been drilled for iron ore but is now being reassessed for its copper and base metal potential, particularly at the Eagle Ridge prospect.

Average Trading Volume: 4,578,364

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$31.21M

data.title: PATEO CONNECT Cornerstone Investors Extend Share Lock-Up to 18 Months
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation Class H ( (HK:2889) ).

PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation announced that its two cornerstone investors, Horizon Together Holding Ltd. and JSC International Investment Fund SPC (Huangshan SP), have voluntarily extended the lock-up period on a combined 4,166,020 H shares from six months to 18 months from the listing date. Horizon and Huangshan SP currently hold about 1.43% and 1.35% of the company’s total issued shares, respectively, and the board said the extended lock-up underscores these investors’ strong confidence in PATEO CONNECT’s long-term prospects and supports the company’s business development and share price stability, while cautioning shareholders and potential investors when trading its securities.

The voluntary extension reduces near-term selling pressure from key institutional holders and signals commitment from early backers, which may bolster market perception of the company’s growth outlook and capital market standing. By securing a longer lock-up from cornerstone investors, PATEO CONNECT reinforces its financial market credibility and potentially enhances stability in its share performance during the post-listing period, which is a critical phase for newly listed issuers.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2889) stock is a Buy with a HK$200.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation Class H stock, see the HK:2889 Stock Forecast page.

More about PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation Class H

PATEO CONNECT Technology (Shanghai) Corporation is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China with limited liability and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2889. The company operates in the technology sector, focusing on connected vehicle and smart mobility solutions, and attracts institutional investors through cornerstone share placements in its Hong Kong listing.
